question: Among the top 10 instance display names in availability zone 'flare3' with the highest number of network info cache records, return only those display names that also have a non-deleted system metadata entry with KEY = 'image_image_type' and whose average instance MEMORY_MB is greater than 75% of the maximum MEMORY_MB for that same display name. For each such display name, show the cache record count, total vCPUs, total memory (MB), and the MEMORY_MB variance, standard deviation (using STDDEV only and never STDDEV_POP), average, and maximum. Do not return any rounded answers.
query: WITH MemoryStatsByDisplayName AS ( WITH inner_cte AS ( SELECT i.DISPLAY_NAME, VARIANCE(i.MEMORY_MB) AS memory_mb_variance, STDDEV(i.MEMORY_MB) AS memory_mb_stddev FROM INSTANCES AS i JOIN INSTANCE_SYSTEM_METADATA AS ism ON ism.INSTANCE_UUID = i.UUID JOIN INSTANCE_INFO_CACHES AS iic ON i.UUID = iic.INSTANCE_UUID WHERE ism.KEY = 'image_image_type' AND ism.DELETED = 0 GROUP BY i.DISPLAY_NAME ORDER BY memory_mb_variance DESC ) SELECT inner_cte.DISPLAY_NAME, inner_cte.memory_mb_variance, inner_cte.memory_mb_stddev, AVG(i.MEMORY_MB) AS avg_memory_mb, MAX(i.MEMORY_MB) AS max_memory_mb FROM inner_cte JOIN INSTANCES AS i ON i.DISPLAY_NAME = inner_cte.DISPLAY_NAME JOIN INSTANCE_SYSTEM_METADATA AS ism ON ism.INSTANCE_UUID = i.UUID JOIN INSTANCE_INFO_CACHES AS iic ON iic.INSTANCE_UUID = i.UUID WHERE ism.KEY = 'image_image_type' AND ism.DELETED = 0 GROUP BY inner_cte.DISPLAY_NAME, inner_cte.memory_mb_variance, inner_cte.memory_mb_stddev HAVING (AVG(i.MEMORY_MB) * 1.0 / MAX(i.MEMORY_MB)) > 0.75 ORDER BY avg_memory_mb DESC ), Top10CacheRecordsFlare3 AS ( WITH inner_cte AS ( SELECT i.display_name, COUNT(iic.id) AS cache_records FROM INSTANCES AS i JOIN INSTANCE_INFO_CACHES AS iic ON i.uuid = iic.instance_uuid WHERE i.availability_zone = 'flare3' GROUP BY i.display_name ORDER BY cache_records DESC LIMIT 10 ) SELECT inner_cte.display_name, inner_cte.cache_records, SUM(i.vcpus) AS total_vcpus, SUM(i.memory_mb) AS total_memory_mb FROM inner_cte JOIN INSTANCES AS i ON i.display_name = inner_cte.display_name AND i.availability_zone = 'flare3' GROUP BY inner_cte.display_name, inner_cte.cache_records ORDER BY inner_cte.cache_records DESC ) SELECT t.display_name, t.cache_records, t.total_vcpus, t.total_memory_mb, m.memory_mb_variance, m.memory_mb_stddev, m.avg_memory_mb, m.max_memory_mb FROM Top10CacheRecordsFlare3 AS t JOIN MemoryStatsByDisplayName AS m ON m.DISPLAY_NAME = t.display_name ORDER BY t.cache_records DESC, m.avg_memory_mb DESC;

question: For each department that grants degrees (excluding Political Science), provide the department name, the average and variance of the total number of enrolled students in subjects offered by that department (considering only subjects with more than 0 enrolled students), and, for Chemistry and Biology departments, also include the variance of the number of enrolled students in courses that have at least one enrolled student and have course materials with a material status of 'RQ'. List the department name, average enrollment, enrollment variance, and enrolled variance from course materials in that order. Do not return any rounded answers.
query: WITH DeptEnrollmentStats AS ( SELECT scd.DEPARTMENT_NAME, AVG(sos.NUM_ENROLLED_STUDENTS) AS avg_enrollment, VARIANCE(sos.NUM_ENROLLED_STUDENTS) AS enrollment_variance FROM SIS_COURSE_DESCRIPTION scd JOIN SUBJECT_OFFERED_SUMMARY sos ON scd.COURSE = sos.COURSE_NUMBER WHERE sos.NUM_ENROLLED_STUDENTS > 0 AND scd.IS_DEGREE_GRANTING = 'Y' AND scd.DEPARTMENT_NAME != 'Political Science' GROUP BY scd.DEPARTMENT_NAME ORDER BY enrollment_variance DESC ), DeptMaterialVariance AS ( SELECT tso.OFFER_DEPT_NAME, VARIANCE(tso.NUM_ENROLLED_STUDENTS) AS enrolled_variance FROM TIP_DETAIL td JOIN TIP_SUBJECT_OFFERED tso ON td.TIP_SUBJECT_OFFERED_KEY = tso.TIP_SUBJECT_OFFERED_KEY WHERE tso.NUM_ENROLLED_STUDENTS > 0 AND td.TIP_MATERIAL_STATUS_KEY = 'RQ' AND tso.OFFER_DEPT_NAME IN ('Chemistry', 'Biology') GROUP BY tso.OFFER_DEPT_NAME ORDER BY enrolled_variance DESC ) SELECT des.DEPARTMENT_NAME, des.avg_enrollment, des.enrollment_variance, dmv.enrolled_variance FROM DeptEnrollmentStats des LEFT JOIN DeptMaterialVariance dmv ON des.DEPARTMENT_NAME = dmv.OFFER_DEPT_NAME ORDER BY des.enrollment_variance DESC, dmv.enrolled_variance DESC

question: For each organization, what is the geometric mean of the old department codes for all associated HR organization units where the old department code is greater than zero, excluding organizations '138' and '250', and only for organizations that are not 'CAMBRIDGE-MIT INST'? Also, for each result, show the corresponding HR organization unit title. Do not return any rounded answers.
query: WITH inner_cte AS ( SELECT FCLT_ORGANIZATION.ORGANIZATION_NAME, EXP(AVG(LN(HR_ORG_UNIT.HR_DEPARTMENT_CODE_OLD))) AS geometric_mean, HR_ORG_UNIT.HR_ORG_UNIT_ID FROM FCLT_ORGANIZATION JOIN HR_ORG_UNIT ON FCLT_ORGANIZATION.HR_ORG_UNIT_ID = HR_ORG_UNIT.HR_ORG_UNIT_ID WHERE HR_ORG_UNIT.HR_DEPARTMENT_CODE_OLD > 0 AND FCLT_ORGANIZATION.ORGANIZATION_ID NOT IN ('138', '250') AND FCLT_ORGANIZATION.ORGANIZATION_NAME NOT IN ('CAMBRIDGE-MIT INST') GROUP BY FCLT_ORGANIZATION.ORGANIZATION_NAME, HR_ORG_UNIT.HR_ORG_UNIT_ID ) SELECT inner_cte.ORGANIZATION_NAME, inner_cte.geometric_mean, HR_ORG_UNIT.HR_ORG_UNIT_TITLE FROM inner_cte JOIN HR_ORG_UNIT ON inner_cte.HR_ORG_UNIT_ID = HR_ORG_UNIT.HR_ORG_UNIT_ID ORDER BY inner_cte.geometric_mean DESC;

question: For instances in availability zone 'flare3' whose display name matches the pattern 'flare', list each instance’s display name, availability zone, VM state, memory in MB, vCPU count, instance UUID, and the maximum system-metadata ID over a window covering the current row and the next 2 rows (ordered by instance UUID), and also show (by VM state) the geometric mean of instance memory (in MB) across instances with a system metadata key of 'image_image_type' and memory greater than 0 that are running on host 'blaze8-12'. Do not return any rounded answers.
query: WITH InstanceDetails AS ( SELECT i.display_name, i.availability_zone, i.vm_state, i.memory_mb, i.vcpus, i.uuid, MAX(ism.id) OVER ( ORDER BY i.uuid ROWS BETWEEN CURRENT ROW AND 2 FOLLOWING ) AS max_metadata_id_next_2 FROM instances AS i JOIN instance_system_metadata AS ism ON i.uuid = ism.instance_uuid WHERE i.availability_zone = 'flare3' AND i.display_name REGEXP 'flare' ), VMStateGeoMean AS ( SELECT i.vm_state, EXP(AVG(LN(i.memory_mb))) AS geometric_mean_memory_mb FROM instances AS i JOIN instance_system_metadata AS ism ON i.uuid = ism.instance_uuid WHERE i.memory_mb > 0 AND ism.key = 'image_image_type' AND i.host = 'blaze8-12' GROUP BY i.vm_state ORDER BY geometric_mean_memory_mb DESC ) SELECT id.display_name, id.availability_zone, id.vm_state, id.memory_mb, id.vcpus, id.uuid, id.max_metadata_id_next_2, vmg.geometric_mean_memory_mb FROM InstanceDetails id LEFT JOIN VMStateGeoMean vmg ON id.vm_state = vmg.vm_state;

question: For each degree-granting department (excluding Mathematics, Chemistry, and Biology), list the department name, the average and variance of the ASCII values of its subject codes' course numbers, the average, variance, and standard deviation (using STDDEV only and never STDDEV_POP) of the total units of its courses (considering only courses with more than 0 total units), and the number of students in that department according to the student directory. Show the columns in this order: department name, average course number ASCII, variance of course number ASCII, average total units, variance of total units, standard deviation (using STDDEV only and never STDDEV_POP) of total units, and student count. Do not return any rounded answers.
query: WITH inner_cte AS ( WITH DeptCourseNumberStats AS ( SELECT d.DEPARTMENT_NAME, d.DEPARTMENT_CODE, AVG(ASCII(s.COURSE_NUMBER)) AS avg_course_number_ascii, VARIANCE(ASCII(s.COURSE_NUMBER)) AS var_course_number_ascii FROM SIS_DEPARTMENT d JOIN SIS_SUBJECT_CODE s ON d.DEPARTMENT_CODE = s.DEPARTMENT_CODE WHERE d.IS_DEGREE_GRANTING = 'Y' AND d.DEPARTMENT_NAME != 'Mathematics' GROUP BY d.DEPARTMENT_NAME, d.DEPARTMENT_CODE ), DeptCourseUnitsStats AS ( SELECT sd.DEPARTMENT_NAME, sd.DEPARTMENT_CODE, AVG(ccc.TOTAL_UNITS) AS avg_total_units, VARIANCE(ccc.TOTAL_UNITS) AS total_units_variance, STDDEV(ccc.TOTAL_UNITS) AS total_units_stddev FROM SIS_DEPARTMENT sd JOIN CIS_COURSE_CATALOG ccc ON sd.DEPARTMENT_CODE = ccc.DEPARTMENT_CODE WHERE sd.IS_DEGREE_GRANTING = 'Y' AND ccc.TOTAL_UNITS > 0 AND sd.DEPARTMENT_NAME NOT IN ('Chemistry', 'Biology') GROUP BY sd.DEPARTMENT_NAME, sd.DEPARTMENT_CODE ) SELECT d1.DEPARTMENT_NAME, d1.DEPARTMENT_CODE, d1.avg_course_number_ascii, d1.var_course_number_ascii, d2.avg_total_units, d2.total_units_variance, d2.total_units_stddev FROM DeptCourseNumberStats d1 JOIN DeptCourseUnitsStats d2 ON d1.DEPARTMENT_CODE = d2.DEPARTMENT_CODE ) SELECT ic.DEPARTMENT_NAME, ic.avg_course_number_ascii, ic.var_course_number_ascii, ic.avg_total_units, ic.total_units_variance, ic.total_units_stddev, COUNT(msd.FULL_NAME) AS student_count FROM inner_cte ic LEFT JOIN MIT_STUDENT_DIRECTORY msd ON ic.DEPARTMENT_NAME = msd.DEPARTMENT_NAME GROUP BY ic.DEPARTMENT_NAME, ic.avg_course_number_ascii, ic.var_course_number_ascii, ic.avg_total_units, ic.total_units_variance, ic.total_units_stddev

question: Show the department names, the corresponding SIS subject code, subject code descriptions, graduate level, the total number of courses per department, and for each department, the average, minimum, and maximum total units for all subjects offered in the COURSE_CATALOG_SUBJECT_OFFERED table. Do not return any rounded answers.
query: WITH inner_cte AS ( SELECT sd.DEPARTMENT_NAME, sc.SUBJECT_CODE, sc.SUBJECT_CODE_DESC, scd.GRADUATE_LEVEL, Total_Courses.Total_Courses FROM SIS_DEPARTMENT sd JOIN SIS_COURSE_DESCRIPTION scd ON sd.DEPARTMENT_CODE = scd.DEPARTMENT JOIN SIS_SUBJECT_CODE sc ON scd.COURSE = sc.COURSE_NUMBER JOIN ( SELECT sd.DEPARTMENT_NAME, COUNT(DISTINCT COURSE_NUMBER) AS Total_Courses FROM SIS_DEPARTMENT sd JOIN SIS_COURSE_DESCRIPTION scd ON sd.DEPARTMENT_CODE = scd.DEPARTMENT JOIN SIS_SUBJECT_CODE sc ON scd.COURSE = sc.COURSE_NUMBER GROUP BY DEPARTMENT_NAME ) AS Total_Courses ON sd.DEPARTMENT_NAME = Total_Courses.DEPARTMENT_NAME ) SELECT i.DEPARTMENT_NAME, i.SUBJECT_CODE, i.SUBJECT_CODE_DESC, i.GRADUATE_LEVEL, i.Total_Courses, AVG(ccso.TOTAL_UNITS) AS avg_total_units, MIN(ccso.TOTAL_UNITS) AS min_total_units, MAX(ccso.TOTAL_UNITS) AS max_total_units FROM inner_cte i JOIN COURSE_CATALOG_SUBJECT_OFFERED ccso ON i.DEPARTMENT_NAME = ccso.DEPARTMENT_NAME GROUP BY i.DEPARTMENT_NAME, i.SUBJECT_CODE, i.SUBJECT_CODE_DESC, i.GRADUATE_LEVEL, i.Total_Courses ORDER BY i.DEPARTMENT_NAME, i.SUBJECT_CODE;

question: For each school and each of its degree-granting departments (excluding the Mathematics department) that have a maximum CIP program code among all courses in the department greater than 120000, list the school name, department name, the maximum CIP program code among all courses in those departments, and the department's average total units for courses with more than 0 total units if the department's average is greater than the overall average for its school. For each school, also include a grand total row for all departments in the format (school name, null, total max CIP program code, null). Do not return any rounded answers.
query: WITH inner_cte1 AS ( SELECT d.DEPARTMENT_NAME, MAX(c.CIP_PROGRAM_CODE) AS max_cip_code, d.DEPARTMENT_FULL_NAME, d.SCHOOL_NAME FROM SIS_COURSE_DESCRIPTION c JOIN SIS_DEPARTMENT d ON c.DEPARTMENT = d.DEPARTMENT_CODE WHERE d.IS_DEGREE_GRANTING = 'Y' AND d.DEPARTMENT_CODE <> '18' GROUP BY d.DEPARTMENT_NAME, d.DEPARTMENT_FULL_NAME, d.SCHOOL_NAME HAVING MAX(c.CIP_PROGRAM_CODE) > 120000 ), SchoolSummary AS ( SELECT SCHOOL_NAME, COUNT(DISTINCT DEPARTMENT_NAME) AS num_departments, MAX(max_cip_code) AS max_cip_code FROM inner_cte1 GROUP BY SCHOOL_NAME ), SchoolDeptMaxCIP AS ( SELECT ss.SCHOOL_NAME, ic.DEPARTMENT_NAME, ss.max_cip_code FROM SchoolSummary ss LEFT JOIN inner_cte1 ic ON ss.SCHOOL_NAME = ic.SCHOOL_NAME UNION ALL SELECT ss.SCHOOL_NAME, NULL AS DEPARTMENT_NAME, ss.max_cip_code FROM SchoolSummary ss ), inner_cte2 AS ( SELECT sd.SCHOOL_NAME, sd.DEPARTMENT_NAME, sd.DEPARTMENT_CODE, AVG(ccc.TOTAL_UNITS) AS dept_avg_total_units FROM SIS_DEPARTMENT sd JOIN CIS_COURSE_CATALOG ccc ON sd.DEPARTMENT_CODE = ccc.DEPARTMENT_CODE WHERE sd.IS_DEGREE_GRANTING = 'Y' AND ccc.TOTAL_UNITS > 0 GROUP BY sd.SCHOOL_NAME, sd.DEPARTMENT_NAME, sd.DEPARTMENT_CODE ), school_avg AS ( SELECT SCHOOL_NAME, AVG(dept_avg_total_units) AS school_avg_total_units FROM inner_cte2 GROUP BY SCHOOL_NAME ), SchoolDeptAvgUnits AS ( SELECT i.SCHOOL_NAME, i.DEPARTMENT_NAME, i.dept_avg_total_units FROM inner_cte2 i JOIN school_avg s ON i.SCHOOL_NAME = s.SCHOOL_NAME WHERE i.dept_avg_total_units > s.school_avg_total_units ) SELECT sdc.SCHOOL_NAME, sdc.DEPARTMENT_NAME, sdc.max_cip_code, sda.dept_avg_total_units FROM SchoolDeptMaxCIP sdc LEFT JOIN SchoolDeptAvgUnits sda ON sdc.SCHOOL_NAME = sda.SCHOOL_NAME AND sdc.DEPARTMENT_NAME = sda.DEPARTMENT_NAME ORDER BY sdc.SCHOOL_NAME, sdc.DEPARTMENT_NAME

question: For each department, list the department name, the average, range, and variance of the total units for subjects offered in the 2022 academic year that are letter graded (including only degree-granting departments and excluding the Biology department), as well as the average, range, and variance of the number of enrolled students in courses offered by that department, considering only courses with more than 0 enrolled students and only for the Mathematics department. Do not return any rounded answers.
query: WITH DeptUnitsStats AS ( SELECT sd.DEPARTMENT_NAME, AVG(ccso.TOTAL_UNITS) AS avg_total_units, MAX(ccso.TOTAL_UNITS) - MIN(ccso.TOTAL_UNITS) AS range_total_units, VARIANCE(ccso.TOTAL_UNITS) AS var_total_units FROM SIS_DEPARTMENT sd JOIN SIS_COURSE_DESCRIPTION scd ON sd.DEPARTMENT_CODE = scd.DEPARTMENT JOIN COURSE_CATALOG_SUBJECT_OFFERED ccso ON sd.DEPARTMENT_CODE = ccso.DEPARTMENT_CODE WHERE ccso.ACADEMIC_YEAR = 2022 AND ccso.GRADE_TYPE = 'L' AND sd.IS_DEGREE_GRANTING = 'Y' AND sd.DEPARTMENT_CODE <> '7' GROUP BY sd.DEPARTMENT_NAME ), DeptEnrollmentStats AS ( SELECT s.DEPARTMENT_NAME, AVG(l.NUM_ENROLLED_STUDENTS) AS avg_enrollment, MAX(l.NUM_ENROLLED_STUDENTS) - MIN(l.NUM_ENROLLED_STUDENTS) AS enrollment_range, VARIANCE(l.NUM_ENROLLED_STUDENTS) AS enrollment_variance FROM SIS_SUBJECT_CODE s JOIN LIBRARY_SUBJECT_OFFERED l ON s.COURSE_NUMBER = l.COURSE_NUMBER WHERE l.NUM_ENROLLED_STUDENTS > 0 AND s.DEPARTMENT_NAME IS NOT NULL AND s.DEPARTMENT_NAME = 'Mathematics' GROUP BY s.DEPARTMENT_NAME ) SELECT dus.DEPARTMENT_NAME, dus.avg_total_units, dus.range_total_units, dus.var_total_units, des.avg_enrollment, des.enrollment_range, des.enrollment_variance FROM DeptUnitsStats dus JOIN DeptEnrollmentStats des ON dus.DEPARTMENT_NAME = des.DEPARTMENT_NAME ORDER BY dus.DEPARTMENT_NAME;

question: For instances in availability zone "flare3" that have a migration with status "completed" and whose display name matches the pattern "flare", show the instance UUID, instance display name, migration status, the running sum of instance memory (MEMORY_MB) within each migration type ordered by instance memory, and (when the same display name also matches "prime" and has at least 3 system metadata entries) the standard deviation (using STDDEV only and never STDDEV_POP) of instance memory (in MB) across its system metadata rows. Do not return any rounded answers.
query: WITH sq1 AS ( SELECT i.UUID AS instance_uuid, i.DISPLAY_NAME AS instance_display_name, m.STATUS AS migration_status, SUM(i.MEMORY_MB) OVER ( PARTITION BY m.MIGRATION_TYPE ORDER BY i.MEMORY_MB ) AS window_column FROM INSTANCES AS i JOIN MIGRATIONS AS m ON i.UUID = m.INSTANCE_UUID WHERE i.AVAILABILITY_ZONE = 'flare3' AND m.STATUS = 'completed' AND i.DISPLAY_NAME REGEXP 'flare' ), sq2 AS ( SELECT i.display_name, STDDEV(i.memory_mb) AS memory_mb_stddev FROM instances AS i JOIN instance_extra AS ie ON ie.instance_uuid = i.uuid JOIN instance_system_metadata AS ism ON ism.instance_uuid = i.uuid WHERE i.display_name REGEXP 'prime' GROUP BY i.display_name HAVING COUNT(*) > 2 ORDER BY memory_mb_stddev DESC ) SELECT sq1.instance_uuid, sq1.instance_display_name, sq1.migration_status, sq1.window_column, sq2.memory_mb_stddev FROM sq1 JOIN sq2 ON sq1.instance_display_name = sq2.display_name ORDER BY sq2.memory_mb_stddev DESC;

question: For each subject offered in the 2022 academic year with a total of at least 6 units in the Mathematics department (Course 18), show the subject code, subject number, department name, the running sum of subject codes within each department ordered by subject code, and for the Mathematics department, also show the average, variance, and standard deviation (using STDDEV only and never STDDEV_POP) of the total units for subjects offered by that department, considering only subjects that are offered this year and are letter graded. Do not return any rounded answers.
query: WITH SubjectStats AS ( SELECT t2.SUBJECT_CODE, t2.SUBJECT_NUMBER, t2.DEPARTMENT_NAME, SUM(t2.SUBJECT_CODE) OVER (PARTITION BY t2.DEPARTMENT_NAME ORDER BY t2.SUBJECT_CODE) AS window_column FROM ACADEMIC_TERMS_ALL t0 JOIN ACADEMIC_TERMS t1 ON t0.TERM_CODE = t1.TERM_CODE JOIN COURSE_CATALOG_SUBJECT_OFFERED t2 ON t1.TERM_CODE = t2.EFFECTIVE_TERM_CODE WHERE t2.ACADEMIC_YEAR = 2022 AND t2.TOTAL_UNITS >= 6 AND t2.DEPARTMENT_NAME = 'Mathematics' ), DepartmentUnitStats AS ( SELECT ssc.DEPARTMENT_NAME, AVG(ccso.TOTAL_UNITS) AS avg_total_units, VARIANCE(ccso.TOTAL_UNITS) AS total_units_variance, STDDEV(ccso.TOTAL_UNITS) AS total_units_stddev FROM SIS_SUBJECT_CODE ssc JOIN SIS_COURSE_DESCRIPTION scd ON ssc.SUBJECT_CODE = scd.COURSE JOIN COURSE_CATALOG_SUBJECT_OFFERED ccso ON scd.COURSE = ccso.SUBJECT_CODE WHERE ccso.IS_OFFERED_THIS_YEAR = 'Y' AND ccso.GRADE_TYPE = 'L' AND ssc.DEPARTMENT_NAME = 'Mathematics' AND ssc.DEPARTMENT_NAME = 'Mathematics' GROUP BY ssc.DEPARTMENT_NAME ORDER BY total_units_variance DESC ) SELECT ss.SUBJECT_CODE, ss.SUBJECT_NUMBER, ss.DEPARTMENT_NAME, ss.window_column, dus.avg_total_units, dus.total_units_variance, dus.total_units_stddev FROM SubjectStats ss JOIN DepartmentUnitStats dus ON ss.DEPARTMENT_NAME = dus.DEPARTMENT_NAME ORDER BY ss.SUBJECT_CODE;

question: For each instance display name, show the variance and standard deviation (using STDDEV only and never STDDEV_POP) of the instance memory (in MB) across instances that have system metadata with key = 'image_image_type', restricting results to instances running on host 'prime-35'. Also include the overall average of these per-display-name variances as a benchmark, and categorize each display name as 'HIGH_VARIANCE' (at least 50% above the benchmark), 'LOW_VARIANCE' (at least 50% below the benchmark), or 'AVERAGE_VARIANCE'. Do not return any rounded answers.
query: WITH inner_cte AS (SELECT i.display_name, VARIANCE(i.memory_mb) AS memory_mb_variance, STDDEV(i.memory_mb) AS memory_mb_stddev FROM instances AS i JOIN instance_system_metadata AS ism ON i.uuid = ism.instance_uuid WHERE ism.key = 'image_image_type' AND i.host = 'prime-35' GROUP BY i.display_name ORDER BY memory_mb_variance DESC), AverageVariance AS ( SELECT AVG(memory_mb_variance) AS avg_memory_mb_variance FROM inner_cte ) SELECT ic.display_name, ic.memory_mb_variance, ic.memory_mb_stddev, av.avg_memory_mb_variance AS benchmark, CASE WHEN ic.memory_mb_variance > av.avg_memory_mb_variance * 1.5 THEN 'HIGH_VARIANCE' WHEN ic.memory_mb_variance < av.avg_memory_mb_variance * 0.5 THEN 'LOW_VARIANCE' ELSE 'AVERAGE_VARIANCE' END AS variance_category FROM inner_cte ic CROSS JOIN AverageVariance av ORDER BY ic.memory_mb_variance DESC;

question: For instances on host blaze8-12 that have completed migrations and also have system metadata key image_image_type, show the migration status, source compute, destination compute, instance display name, the instance system metadata key, the image_image_type metadata value, and cached network info, along with the migration dense rank and the image-type row number. Do not return any rounded answers.
query: WITH MigrationDetails AS ( SELECT m.status, m.source_compute, m.dest_compute, i.display_name, ism.key, DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY m.instance_uuid ORDER BY m.instance_uuid) AS window_column FROM migrations AS m JOIN instances AS i ON m.instance_uuid = i.uuid JOIN instance_system_metadata AS ism ON i.uuid = ism.instance_uuid WHERE m.status = 'completed' AND i.host = 'blaze8-12' ), ImageTypeMetadata AS ( SELECT t1.DISPLAY_NAME, t0.VALUE AS metadata_value, t2.NETWORK_INFO, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY t0.VALUE ROWS BETWEEN 2 PRECEDING AND 1 FOLLOWING ) AS window_column FROM INSTANCE_SYSTEM_METADATA AS t0 JOIN INSTANCES AS t1 ON t0.INSTANCE_UUID = t1.UUID JOIN INSTANCE_INFO_CACHES AS t2 ON t1.UUID = t2.INSTANCE_UUID WHERE t0.KEY = 'image_image_type' AND t1.host = 'blaze8-12' ) SELECT md.status AS migration_status, md.source_compute, md.dest_compute, md.display_name, md.key AS instance_system_metadata_key, itm.metadata_value, itm.network_info, md.window_column AS migration_dense_rank, itm.window_column AS image_type_row_number FROM MigrationDetails md JOIN ImageTypeMetadata itm ON md.display_name = itm.display_name ORDER BY md.display_name, itm.metadata_value;

question: List all building rooms that either have an access level of 1 or are on floor 2. For rooms with access level 1, show the building room, floor, space usage, space unit code, space unit name, the average floor within each space unit code group, and the total number of rooms per space unit code, and indicate 'AccessLevel1' as the reason for inclusion. For rooms on floor 2, show the building room, organization name, department name, and the difference between the access level of the room and the average access level for that department, and indicate 'Floor2' as the reason for inclusion. The results should be ordered by building room. Do not return any rounded answers.
query: WITH Subquery1 AS ( WITH inner_cte AS ( SELECT t1.BUILDING_ROOM, t1.FLOOR, t1.SPACE_USAGE, t1.SPACE_UNIT_CODE, t0.SPACE_UNIT, AVG(t1.FLOOR) OVER (PARTITION BY t1.SPACE_UNIT_CODE ORDER BY t1.FLOOR) AS avg_floor FROM SPACE_UNIT t0 JOIN ZPM_ROOMS_LOAD t1 ON t0.SPACE_UNIT_CODE = t1.SPACE_UNIT_CODE WHERE t1.ACCESS_LEVEL = 1 ) SELECT ic.BUILDING_ROOM, ic.FLOOR, ic.SPACE_USAGE, ic.SPACE_UNIT_CODE, ic.SPACE_UNIT, ic.avg_floor, cnt.total_rooms FROM inner_cte ic JOIN ( SELECT SPACE_UNIT_CODE, COUNT(*) AS total_rooms FROM ZPM_ROOMS_LOAD WHERE ACCESS_LEVEL = 1 GROUP BY SPACE_UNIT_CODE ) cnt ON ic.SPACE_UNIT_CODE = cnt.SPACE_UNIT_CODE ), Subquery2 AS ( WITH inner_cte AS ( SELECT t0.BUILDING_ROOM, t1.ORGANIZATION_NAME, t2.HR_DEPARTMENT_NAME, t0.ACCESS_LEVEL FROM ZPM_ROOMS_LOAD t0 JOIN FCLT_ORGANIZATION t1 ON t0.HR_ORG_UNIT_ID = t1.HR_ORG_UNIT_ID JOIN HR_ORG_UNIT t2 ON t1.HR_ORG_UNIT_ID = t2.HR_ORG_UNIT_ID WHERE t0.FLOOR = 2 ), dept_avg AS ( SELECT HR_DEPARTMENT_NAME, AVG(ACCESS_LEVEL) AS avg_access_level FROM inner_cte GROUP BY HR_DEPARTMENT_NAME ) SELECT i.BUILDING_ROOM, i.ORGANIZATION_NAME, i.HR_DEPARTMENT_NAME, (i.ACCESS_LEVEL - d.avg_access_level) AS access_level_deviation FROM inner_cte i JOIN dept_avg d ON i.HR_DEPARTMENT_NAME = d.HR_DEPARTMENT_NAME ) SELECT s1.BUILDING_ROOM, s1.FLOOR, s1.SPACE_USAGE, s1.SPACE_UNIT_CODE, s1.SPACE_UNIT, s1.avg_floor, s1.total_rooms, NULL AS ORGANIZATION_NAME, NULL AS HR_DEPARTMENT_NAME, NULL AS access_level_deviation, 'AccessLevel1' AS Reason FROM Subquery1 s1 UNION ALL SELECT s2.BUILDING_ROOM, NULL AS FLOOR, NULL AS SPACE_USAGE, NULL AS SPACE_UNIT_CODE, NULL AS SPACE_UNIT, NULL AS avg_floor, NULL AS total_rooms, s2.ORGANIZATION_NAME, s2.HR_DEPARTMENT_NAME, s2.access_level_deviation, 'Floor2' AS Reason FROM Subquery2 s2 ORDER BY BUILDING_ROOM;

question: For each degree-granting department except the Biology department (Course 7), give the department name and the coefficient of variation (using STDDEV only and never STDDEV_POP) of the total units for subjects offered by that department in the most recent academic year, and for each student in the Political Science department (Course 17), show the student's full name, the corresponding school name, the SIS administrative department name, and the dense rank of the student over student year, ordered by department name and student year rank. Do not return any rounded answers.
query: WITH most_recent_year AS ( SELECT MAX(ACADEMIC_YEAR) AS max_year FROM COURSE_CATALOG_SUBJECT_OFFERED ), dept_units AS ( SELECT sd.DEPARTMENT_NAME, sd.DEPARTMENT_CODE, ccs.TOTAL_UNITS FROM COURSE_CATALOG_SUBJECT_OFFERED ccs JOIN SIS_DEPARTMENT sd ON ccs.DEPARTMENT_CODE = sd.DEPARTMENT_CODE WHERE sd.IS_DEGREE_GRANTING = 'Y' AND sd.DEPARTMENT_CODE <> '7' AND ccs.ACADEMIC_YEAR = (SELECT max_year FROM most_recent_year) AND ccs.TOTAL_UNITS IS NOT NULL ), Department_CV AS ( SELECT DEPARTMENT_NAME, DEPARTMENT_CODE, (STDDEV(TOTAL_UNITS) / NULLIF(AVG(TOTAL_UNITS), 0)) AS coefficient_of_variation FROM dept_units GROUP BY DEPARTMENT_NAME, DEPARTMENT_CODE HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ), Political_Science_Students AS ( SELECT msd.FULL_NAME, msd.DEPARTMENT, msd.DEPARTMENT_NAME, sd.SCHOOL_NAME, sad.SIS_ADMIN_DEPARTMENT_NAME, DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY msd.STUDENT_YEAR) AS student_year_rank FROM MIT_STUDENT_DIRECTORY msd JOIN SIS_DEPARTMENT sd ON msd.DEPARTMENT = sd.DEPARTMENT_CODE LEFT JOIN SIS_ADMIN_DEPARTMENT sad ON msd.DEPARTMENT = sad.SIS_ADMIN_DEPARTMENT_CODE WHERE msd.DEPARTMENT = '17' AND msd.DEPARTMENT_NAME = 'Political Science' ) SELECT dcv.DEPARTMENT_NAME, dcv.coefficient_of_variation, pss.FULL_NAME, pss.SCHOOL_NAME, pss.SIS_ADMIN_DEPARTMENT_NAME, pss.student_year_rank FROM Department_CV dcv JOIN Political_Science_Students pss ON dcv.DEPARTMENT_CODE = pss.DEPARTMENT ORDER BY dcv.DEPARTMENT_NAME, pss.student_year_rank;

question: For subjects in the Engineering school during the Fall Term 2024-2025, show the subject title, department name, total units, and assign row numbers within a window of 2 preceding and 1 following rows ordered by subject title. For each subject, also show the average and variance of the number of enrolled students in courses offered by the same department (considering only courses with at least one associated TIP material and total units greater than 0), and classify each subject as 'HIGH_ENROLLMENT' if its enrollment is at least 10% greater than the department average, 'LOW_ENROLLMENT' if at least 10% less, or 'AVERAGE' otherwise. Present the results ordered by enrollment variance (descending) and subject title. Do not return any rounded answers.
query: WITH inner_cte AS ( WITH EngineeringSubjects AS ( SELECT t2.SUBJECT_TITLE, t2.DEPARTMENT_NAME, t2.TOTAL_UNITS, t2.TERM_CODE, t2.SUBJECT_ENROLLMENT_NUMBER, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY t2.SUBJECT_TITLE ROWS BETWEEN 2 PRECEDING AND 1 FOLLOWING) AS window_column FROM ACADEMIC_TERM_PARAMETER t0 JOIN ACADEMIC_TERMS_ALL t1 ON t0.TERM_CODE = t1.TERM_CODE JOIN SUBJECT_SUMMARY t2 ON t1.TERM_CODE = t2.TERM_CODE WHERE t0.TERM_DESCRIPTION = 'Fall Term 2024-2025' AND t2.SCHOOL_NAME = 'Engineering' ), DepartmentEnrollmentStats AS ( SELECT lso.OFFER_DEPT_NAME, AVG(sos.NUM_ENROLLED_STUDENTS) AS avg_enrollment, VARIANCE(sos.NUM_ENROLLED_STUDENTS) AS enrollment_variance FROM LIBRARY_SUBJECT_OFFERED lso JOIN TIP_DETAIL td ON lso.SUBJECT_ID = td.SUBJECT_ID JOIN SUBJECT_OFFERED_SUMMARY sos ON td.SUBJECT_ID = sos.SUBJECT_ID WHERE td.RECORD_COUNT >= 1 AND sos.TOTAL_UNITS > 0 GROUP BY lso.OFFER_DEPT_NAME ORDER BY enrollment_variance DESC ) SELECT es.SUBJECT_TITLE, es.DEPARTMENT_NAME, es.TOTAL_UNITS, es.window_column, es.SUBJECT_ENROLLMENT_NUMBER, des.avg_enrollment, des.enrollment_variance FROM EngineeringSubjects es JOIN DepartmentEnrollmentStats des ON es.DEPARTMENT_NAME = des.OFFER_DEPT_NAME ) SELECT inner_cte.SUBJECT_TITLE, inner_cte.DEPARTMENT_NAME, inner_cte.TOTAL_UNITS, inner_cte.window_column, inner_cte.avg_enrollment, inner_cte.enrollment_variance, inner_cte.SUBJECT_ENROLLMENT_NUMBER, CASE WHEN inner_cte.SUBJECT_ENROLLMENT_NUMBER > inner_cte.avg_enrollment * 1.1 THEN 'HIGH_ENROLLMENT' WHEN inner_cte.SUBJECT_ENROLLMENT_NUMBER < inner_cte.avg_enrollment * 0.9 THEN 'LOW_ENROLLMENT' ELSE 'AVERAGE' END AS enrollment_category FROM inner_cte ORDER BY inner_cte.enrollment_variance DESC, inner_cte.SUBJECT_TITLE;

question: For each academic year and department name where the term status is 'Previous', and for subjects in the "Engineering" school with total units greater than 1, provide the academic year, department name, number of unique subjects offered, minimum total units for those subjects, subject title, school name, academic year description, and the minimum total units in a window of 3 preceding and 1 following row ordered by the academic year. Do not return any rounded answers.
query: WITH Subq1 AS ( SELECT ata.ACADEMIC_YEAR, ccso.DEPARTMENT_NAME, COUNT(DISTINCT ccso.SUBJECT_ID) AS subject_count, MIN(ccso.TOTAL_UNITS) AS min_total_units FROM ACADEMIC_TERMS_ALL ata JOIN ACADEMIC_TERMS at ON ata.TERM_CODE = at.TERM_CODE JOIN COURSE_CATALOG_SUBJECT_OFFERED ccso ON at.TERM_CODE = ccso.TERM_CODE WHERE at.TERM_STATUS = 'Previous' GROUP BY ata.ACADEMIC_YEAR, ccso.DEPARTMENT_NAME ), Subq2 AS ( SELECT s.SUBJECT_TITLE, s.DEPARTMENT_NAME, s.SCHOOL_NAME, ata.ACADEMIC_YEAR_DESC, MIN(s.TOTAL_UNITS) OVER (ORDER BY at.ACADEMIC_YEAR ROWS BETWEEN 3 PRECEDING AND 1 FOLLOWING) AS window_column, s.TERM_CODE FROM SUBJECT_SUMMARY s JOIN ACADEMIC_TERMS_ALL ata ON ata.TERM_CODE = s.TERM_CODE JOIN ACADEMIC_TERMS at ON s.TERM_CODE = at.TERM_CODE WHERE s.SCHOOL_NAME = 'Engineering' AND s.TOTAL_UNITS > 1 ) SELECT sq1.ACADEMIC_YEAR, sq1.DEPARTMENT_NAME, sq1.subject_count, sq1.min_total_units, sq2.SUBJECT_TITLE, sq2.SCHOOL_NAME, sq2.ACADEMIC_YEAR_DESC, sq2.window_column FROM Subq1 sq1 JOIN Subq2 sq2 ON sq1.DEPARTMENT_NAME = sq2.DEPARTMENT_NAME

question: For each department, give the department name and calculate the highest, lowest, and average total units for subjects offered in the 2022FA term (excluding 'Mathematics' and Course 18), and also show the number of unique subject titles offered by each department in that term. Do not return any rounded answers.
query: WITH inner_cte AS ( SELECT scd.DEPARTMENT_NAME, sos.TOTAL_UNITS, sos.SUBJECT_TITLE FROM SUBJECT_OFFERED_SUMMARY sos JOIN SIS_COURSE_DESCRIPTION scd ON sos.COURSE_NUMBER = scd.COURSE JOIN COURSE_CATALOG_SUBJECT_OFFERED ccso ON scd.COURSE = ccso.SUBJECT_CODE WHERE ccso.TERM_CODE = '2022FA' AND sos.TOTAL_UNITS > 0 AND scd.DEPARTMENT_NAME != 'Mathematics' AND scd.DEPARTMENT != '18' ) SELECT DEPARTMENT_NAME, MAX(TOTAL_UNITS) AS max_total_units, MIN(TOTAL_UNITS) AS min_total_units, AVG(TOTAL_UNITS) AS avg_total_units, COUNT(DISTINCT SUBJECT_TITLE) AS num_unique_subject_titles FROM inner_cte GROUP BY DEPARTMENT_NAME ORDER BY max_total_units DESC;

question: For each degree-granting department (excluding Mathematics), show the department name, the average, variance, and standard deviation (using STDDEV only and never STDDEV_POP) of the clearing cost collector values for all associated administrative departments, along with the department's full name and school name. Do not return any rounded answers.
query: WITH inner_cte AS ( SELECT d.DEPARTMENT_NAME, AVG(a.CLEARING_COST_COLLECTOR) AS avg_clearing_cost_collector, VARIANCE(a.CLEARING_COST_COLLECTOR) AS clearing_cost_collector_variance, STDDEV(a.CLEARING_COST_COLLECTOR) AS clearing_cost_collector_stddev FROM SIS_DEPARTMENT d JOIN SIS_ADMIN_DEPARTMENT a ON d.DEPARTMENT_CODE = a.SIS_ADMIN_DEPARTMENT_CODE WHERE d.IS_DEGREE_GRANTING = 'Y' AND d.DEPARTMENT_NAME != 'Mathematics' AND d.DEPARTMENT_CODE != '18' GROUP BY d.DEPARTMENT_NAME ) SELECT ic.DEPARTMENT_NAME, sd.DEPARTMENT_FULL_NAME, sd.SCHOOL_NAME, ic.avg_clearing_cost_collector, ic.clearing_cost_collector_variance, ic.clearing_cost_collector_stddev FROM inner_cte ic JOIN SIS_DEPARTMENT sd ON ic.DEPARTMENT_NAME = sd.DEPARTMENT_NAME ORDER BY ic.clearing_cost_collector_variance DESC;

question: For subjects offered in the academic year 2022 with a total of 12 units in the Mathematics department (Course 18) that are degree-granting, show the subject code, subject title, department name, department full name, course description, course level, school name, the minimum total units value over each department code group, and the coefficient of variation (using STDDEV only and never STDDEV_POP) of the number of enrolled students in the subjects offered by the department (excluding Chemistry and considering only subjects with more than 0 enrolled students), ordered by department code. Do not return any rounded answers.
query: WITH MathSubjects2022 AS ( SELECT c.SUBJECT_CODE, c.SUBJECT_TITLE, d.DEPARTMENT_NAME, d.DEPARTMENT_FULL_NAME, sc.COURSE_DESCRIPTION, sc.COURSE_LEVEL, sc.SCHOOL_NAME, MIN(c.TOTAL_UNITS) OVER (PARTITION BY c.DEPARTMENT_CODE) AS min_total_units_per_dept, c.DEPARTMENT_CODE FROM COURSE_CATALOG_SUBJECT_OFFERED c JOIN SIS_DEPARTMENT d ON c.DEPARTMENT_CODE = d.DEPARTMENT_CODE JOIN SIS_COURSE_DESCRIPTION sc ON c.DEPARTMENT_CODE = sc.DEPARTMENT WHERE c.ACADEMIC_YEAR = 2022 AND c.TOTAL_UNITS = 12 AND c.DEPARTMENT_CODE = '18' AND sc.IS_DEGREE_GRANTING = 'Y' ORDER BY c.DEPARTMENT_CODE ), DeptStudentVariation AS ( SELECT sd.DEPARTMENT_NAME, STDDEV_SAMP(sos.NUM_ENROLLED_STUDENTS) / AVG(sos.NUM_ENROLLED_STUDENTS) AS coefficient_of_variation, sd.DEPARTMENT_CODE FROM SIS_DEPARTMENT sd JOIN SUBJECT_OFFERED_SUMMARY sos ON sd.DEPARTMENT_CODE = sos.OFFER_DEPT_CODE WHERE sos.NUM_ENROLLED_STUDENTS > 0 AND sd.DEPARTMENT_NAME <> 'Chemistry' GROUP BY sd.DEPARTMENT_NAME, sd.DEPARTMENT_CODE HAVING COUNT(sos.NUM_ENROLLED_STUDENTS) > 1 ) SELECT m.SUBJECT_CODE, m.SUBJECT_TITLE, m.DEPARTMENT_NAME, m.DEPARTMENT_FULL_NAME, m.COURSE_DESCRIPTION, m.COURSE_LEVEL, m.SCHOOL_NAME, m.min_total_units_per_dept, dsv.coefficient_of_variation FROM MathSubjects2022 m LEFT JOIN DeptStudentVariation dsv ON m.DEPARTMENT_NAME = dsv.DEPARTMENT_NAME ORDER BY m.DEPARTMENT_CODE;

question: For each combination of academic year, academic year description, department (with subtotals and grand total as described), and each academic building at MIT with more than 10 rooms, provide the academic year, academic year description, department name, the range and variance of the total units for subjects offered in current terms, the building name, the range, variance, and standard deviation (using STDDEV only and never STDDEV_POP) of the areas of its rooms, the total assignable area, and the year the building was built. Do not repeat the academic year if it is the same as the previous row. Sort the results by academic year, department, and the range of room areas in descending order. Do not return any rounded answers.
query: WITH inner_cte1 AS ( SELECT ACADEMIC_TERMS.ACADEMIC_YEAR, ACADEMIC_TERMS.ACADEMIC_YEAR_DESC, COURSE_CATALOG_SUBJECT_OFFERED.DEPARTMENT_NAME, COURSE_CATALOG_SUBJECT_OFFERED.TOTAL_UNITS FROM COURSE_CATALOG_SUBJECT_OFFERED JOIN ACADEMIC_TERMS ON COURSE_CATALOG_SUBJECT_OFFERED.TERM_CODE = ACADEMIC_TERMS.TERM_CODE JOIN ACADEMIC_TERM_PARAMETER ON ACADEMIC_TERMS.TERM_CODE = ACADEMIC_TERM_PARAMETER.TERM_CODE WHERE ACADEMIC_TERM_PARAMETER.IS_CURRENT_TERM = 'Y' ), cte_subject_units AS ( SELECT CASE WHEN GROUPING(ACADEMIC_YEAR) = 1 AND GROUPING(DEPARTMENT_NAME) = 1 THEN 9999 ELSE ACADEMIC_YEAR END AS year_sort, CASE WHEN GROUPING(ACADEMIC_YEAR) = 0 AND GROUPING(DEPARTMENT_NAME) = 1 THEN 'SUBTOTAL' WHEN GROUPING(ACADEMIC_YEAR) = 1 AND GROUPING(DEPARTMENT_NAME) = 1 THEN 'TOTAL' ELSE DEPARTMENT_NAME END AS dept, CASE WHEN GROUPING(ACADEMIC_YEAR) = 0 AND GROUPING(DEPARTMENT_NAME) = 1 THEN 'zzz' ELSE DEPARTMENT_NAME END AS dept_sort, ACADEMIC_YEAR AS academic_year, MAX(TOTAL_UNITS) - MIN(TOTAL_UNITS) AS units_range, VARIANCE(TOTAL_UNITS) AS units_variance, MAX(ACADEMIC_YEAR_DESC) AS academic_year_desc FROM inner_cte1 GROUP BY ACADEMIC_YEAR, DEPARTMENT_NAME WITH ROLLUP ), SubjectUnitsStats AS ( SELECT CASE WHEN LAG(academic_year) OVER (ORDER BY year_sort, academic_year, dept_sort) = academic_year THEN NULL ELSE academic_year END AS academic_year, academic_year_desc, dept, units_range, units_variance FROM cte_subject_units tbl ORDER BY year_sort, dept_sort ), inner_cte2 AS ( SELECT b.BUILDING_NAME, MAX(r.AREA) - MIN(r.AREA) AS area_range, VARIANCE(r.AREA) AS area_variance, STDDEV(r.AREA) AS area_stddev FROM FCLT_BUILDING b JOIN FCLT_ROOMS r ON b.FCLT_BUILDING_KEY = r.FCLT_BUILDING_KEY WHERE b.SITE = 'MIT' AND b.BUILDING_TYPE = 'ACADEMIC' GROUP BY b.BUILDING_NAME HAVING COUNT(r.FCLT_ROOM_KEY) > 10 ), BuildingRoomStats AS ( SELECT ic.BUILDING_NAME, ic.area_range, ic.area_variance, ic.area_stddev, b.ASSIGNABLE_AREA, b.DATE_BUILT FROM inner_cte2 ic JOIN FCLT_BUILDING b ON ic.BUILDING_NAME = b.BUILDING_NAME ORDER BY ic.area_range DESC ) SELECT s.academic_year, s.academic_year_desc, s.dept, s.units_range, s.units_variance, b.BUILDING_NAME, b.area_range, b.area_variance, b.area_stddev, b.ASSIGNABLE_AREA, b.DATE_BUILT FROM SubjectUnitsStats s CROSS JOIN BuildingRoomStats b ORDER BY s.academic_year, s.dept, b.area_range DESC;
